⚔️ Play vs Friend
Challenge a friend in real-time. Share a room code or enter theirs to join. Both players need to have the site open simultaneously.
🏴‍☠️ Create a Room
No saved decks yet — build one in Deck Builder!

⏳ Waiting for opponent to join...
OR
🔗 Join a Room
No saved decks yet — build one in Deck Builder!
How it works: Rooms use your Firebase database to sync moves in real-time. Both players must be signed in or the same browser session. Room codes expire after 30 minutes.

active and return all given DON!! to your cost area.', Draw:'Draw 1 card from your deck. Run out of cards = you lose!', 'DON!!':'Gain 2 DON!! (1 on your very first turn). Maximum 10 total.', Main:'Play characters/events, give DON!! to boost power, or declare attacks.', End:'Return all DON!! from cards to cost area. Pass the turn.', }; const TUT = [ {t:'Welcome, Pirate!',b:'This tutorial walks you through your first game. Follow the gold prompts and highlighted action buttons.',a:null}, {t:'Your Leader Card',b:'The large card is your Leader. It has Power, Life (red pips), and a Color. Drain your opponent\'s life to zero to win!',a:null}, {t:'Life & Damage',b:'Each red pip = 1 life card. Taking damage adds that life card to your hand. When life hits zero and you take one more hit — you lose.',a:null}, {t:'The DON!! System',b:'Those yellow circles are DON!! — your resource. Earn 2 per turn. Spend them to play cards or attach DON!! for +1000 power each. Click ▶ Next Phase.',a:'np'}, {t:'Draw Phase',b:'Draw 1 card each turn. Run out of cards = you lose! Click ▶ Next Phase.',a:'np'}, {t:'Gaining DON!!',b:'2 DON!! activate now. On your very first turn you only get 1. Click ▶ Next Phase to enter the main phase.',a:'np'}, {t:'Play a Character!',b:'In the Main Phase, click a card in your hand to select it (glows gold). Then click ＋ Play Selected. Card cost = DON!! required.',a:'play'}, {t:'Characters on Field',b:'Up to 5 characters on the field. Boost them with DON!! for +1000 power each — stronger cards hit harder and survive longer.',a:null}, {t:'Declare an Attack!',b:'Select a character or use your Leader. Click ⚔ Attack w/ Selected or ⚔ Attack w/ Leader. Attack the Leader for life damage or a Character to K.O. it.',a:'atk'}, {t:'End Your Turn',b:'Click ▶ Next Phase twice to reach End and pass the turn. Drain all life pips to win!',a:'np'}, {t:'You\'re Ready! 🏴‍☠️',b:'Loop: Refresh→Draw→DON!!→Main→End. Rush=attack same turn. Blocker=protects your leader. Go claim the Grand Line!',a:null}, ]; const OP_CHARS = [ {name:'Monkey D. Luffy',quote:'"I\'m gonna be King of the Pirates!"',img:'https://optcgapi.com/media/static/Card_Images/ST01-001.jpg'}, {name:'Roronoa Zoro',quote:'"Nothing happened."',img:'https://optcgapi.com/media/static/Card_Images/OP01-001.jpg'}, {name:'Nami',quote:'"I\'ll draw a map of the entire world!"',img:'https://optcgapi.com/media/static/Card_Images/ST01-007.jpg'}, {name:'Portgas D. Ace',quote:'"No matter how troubled you might be..."',img:'https://optcgapi.com/media/static/Card_Images/OP01-024.jpg'}, {name:'Nico Robin',quote:'"I want to live! Take me out to sea with you!"',img:'https://optcgapi.com/media/static/Card_Images/ST01-008.jpg'}, {name:'Shanks',quote:'"Inherited Will. The Destiny of the Age."',img:'https://optcgapi.com/media/static/Card_Images/OP01-120.jpg'} ]; /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ STATE ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ let USER = {name:'',xp:'beginner',lang:'English',uid:null,isGuest:true}; /* ── Global Settings ── */ var SETTINGS = { zoomMode: 'click', // 'click' = right-click fullscreen | 'hover' = tooltip on hover | 'window' = detached mini-window cardAnimation: true, // card flip/hover animations autoEndTurn: false, // auto advance to next phase when no actions left showPowerCalc: true, // show +DON!! power in real time on cards soundEnabled: true, // UI sound effects (future) deckWarnings: true, // warn when deck < 50 cards on save logExpanded: true, // keep game log expanded theme: 'dark', // 'dark' only for now }; function loadSettings(){ try{ const s = localStorage.getItem('op_settings'); if(s) SETTINGS = {...SETTINGS, ...JSON.parse(s)}; }catch(e){} } function saveSettings(){ localStorage.setItem('op_settings', JSON.stringify(SETTINGS)); } loadSettings(); let G = {}; let DB = {name:'',color:'Red',sleeve:'Classic',leader:'ST01-001',cards:{}}; let savedDecks = []; let history = []; let gMode = 'tutorial'; let aiDiff = 'easy'; let p1Lid = 'ST01-001'; let fbUser = null; let loTimer = null; /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ HELPERS ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function showScreen(id){ document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active')); const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.classList.add('active'); setBgImage(id); } function openM(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open');} function closeM(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');} function toast(msg, type=''){ const container = document.getElementById('toast'); if(!container) return; // If we're in gameplay, route err/warn to in-mat notifier if(G && G.p1 && (type==='err'||type==='warn'||type==='')){ const screen = document.getElementById('screen-game'); if(screen && screen.classList.contains('active')){ gameNotify(msg, type||'info'); return; } } // Global toast (top-right) for non-gameplay or ok messages const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'tst' + (type?' '+type:''); el.textContent = msg; container.appendChild(el); // Auto-dismiss with fade const dismiss = () => { el.classList.add('fading'); setTimeout(() => { if(el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el); }, 350); }; const t = setTimeout(dismiss, type==='err'||type==='warn' ? 4000 : 3000); el.addEventListener('click', () => { clearTimeout(t); dismiss(); }); } /* ── In-mat gameplay notification ── */ let _gnTimers = new WeakMap(); function gameNotify(msg, type){ const container = document.getElementById('game-notify'); if(!container) return; const typeMap = { 'err': {cls:'gn-err', icon:'⚠'}, 'warn': {cls:'gn-warn', icon:'⚡'}, 'ok': {cls:'gn-ok', icon:'✓'}, 'info': {cls:'gn-info', icon:'ℹ'}, '': {cls:'gn-info', icon:'ℹ'}, }; const {cls, icon} = typeMap[type] || typeMap['info']; // Clear existing messages of same type to avoid stacking duplicates container.querySelectorAll('.'+cls).forEach(el => { clearTimeout(_gnTimers.get(el)); el.classList.add('fading'); setTimeout(()=>{ if(el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el); }, 350); }); const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'gn-msg ' + cls; el.innerHTML = ''+icon+''+msg+''; container.appendChild(el); const duration = type==='err' ? 3500 : 2500; const dismiss = () => { el.classList.add('fading'); setTimeout(()=>{ if(el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el); }, 350); }; const t = setTimeout(dismiss, duration); _gnTimers.set(el, t); el.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ clearTimeout(t); dismiss(); }); } function colorHex(c){return{Red:'#e8312a',Blue:'#3a8fe8',Green:'#3ab87a',Purple:'#8b5cf6',Yellow:'#f5c842',Black:'#6b7280'}[c]||'#888';} function shuffle(a){const b=[...a];for(let i=b.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));[b[i],b[j]]=[b[j],b[i]];}return b;} function $i(id){return document.getElementById(id);} function setH(id,h){const e=$i(id);if(e)e.innerHTML=h;} function setD(id,v){const e=$i(id);if(e)e.disabled=v;} /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ LOADING OVERLAY ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function showLoad(lbl,ms=1400){ const c=OP_CHARS[Math.floor(Math.random()*OP_CHARS.length)]; $i('lo-img').src=c.img;$i('lo-img').style.display='block'; $i('lo-name').textContent=c.name;$i('lo-quote').textContent=c.quote; $i('lo-lbl').textContent=lbl||'Setting Sail...'; $i('loadov').classList.add('show'); return new Promise(res=>{loTimer=setTimeout(()=>{$i('loadov').classList.remove('show');res();},ms);}); } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ FIREBASE (lazy — only loads when Google sign-in clicked) ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ const FB_CONFIG = { apiKey:"AIzaSyAGENMQEXcxJDgcya3Wt5CRzjh1xHDOkhc", authDomain:"op-tcg-simulator.firebaseapp.com", projectId:"op-tcg-simulator", storageBucket:"op-tcg-simulator.firebasestorage.app", messagingSenderId:"558424760430", appId:"1:558424760430:web:c8a2840f1ba29d947b067f" }; let fbDb=null,fbAuth=null,fbReady=false,fbLoading=false; function loadFB(){ return new Promise((res,rej)=>{ if(fbReady){res();return;} if(fbLoading){const p=setInterval(()=>{if(fbReady||!fbLoading){clearInterval(p);res();}},100);return;} fbLoading=true; const urls=['https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-app-compat.js', 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-auth-compat.js', 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-firestore-compat.js']; let done=0; urls.forEach(src=>{ const s=document.createElement('script');s.src=src; s.onload=()=>{done++;if(done===urls.length){ try{ if(!firebase.apps.length)firebase.initializeApp(FB_CONFIG); fbAuth=firebase.auth();fbDb=firebase.firestore();fbReady=true;fbLoading=false; fbAuth.onAuthStateChanged(u=>{ fbUser=u; if(u){ try{ $i('sync-badge').style.display='block'; }catch(e){} // Only navigate if not already handled by signInWithGoogle if(!window._authNavigated){ loadCloudProfile(u.uid, u); } } else { // Signed out — reset navigation flag window._authNavigated = false; } }); res(); }catch(e){fbLoading=false;rej(e);} }}; s.onerror=()=>{fbLoading=false;rej(new Error('Failed: '+src));}; document.head.appendChild(s); }); }); } async function signInWithGoogle(){ toast('Loading Google Sign-In...'); try{await loadFB();}catch(e){toast('Could not load Firebase — check internet.','err');return;} try{ const p = new firebase.auth.GoogleAuthProvider(); p.addScope('profile'); p.setCustomParameters({prompt:'select_account'}); const result = await fbAuth.signInWithPopup(p); if(result && result.user){ toast('Signed in as '+result.user.displayName,'ok'); // Explicitly call loadCloudProfile — don't rely solely on onAuthStateChanged await loadCloudProfile(result.user.uid, result.user); } }catch(e){ if(e.code==='auth/popup-closed-by-user') return; if(e.code==='auth/popup-blocked'){ toast('Popup blocked — please allow popups for this site','err'); } else { toast('Sign-in failed: '+e.message,'err'); console.error('Google sign-in error:',e); } } } function signOut(){ window._authNavigated = false;if(fbAuth)fbAuth.signOut();USER={name:'',xp:'beginner',lang:'English',uid:null,isGuest:true};history=[];fbUser=null;$i('sync-badge').style.display='none';showScreen('screen-auth');} async function loadCloudProfile(uid, userObj){ // Prevent double-navigation if called from both signInWithGoogle and onAuthStateChanged if(window._authNavigated) return; window._authNavigated = true; USER.uid = uid; USER.isGuest = false; // Use passed userObj or fall back to fbAuth.currentUser const firebaseUser = userObj || (fbAuth && fbAuth.currentUser); // Pre-populate name from Google account immediately if(firebaseUser && firebaseUser.displayName){ USER.name = USER.name || firebaseUser.displayName; } // Try to load from Firestore (non-blocking — failures still navigate) let isNewUser = true; if(fbDb){ try{ const doc = await fbDb.collection('users').doc(uid).get(); if(doc.exists){ isNewUser = false; const d = doc.data(); USER = {...USER, ...d, uid, isGuest:false}; // Load history in background, don't block navigation fbDb.collection('users').doc(uid) .collection('history').orderBy('timestamp','desc').limit(100).get() .then(snap=>{ history = snap.docs.map(d=>({id:d.id,...d.data()})); localStorage.setItem('op_hist', JSON.stringify(history)); }).catch(()=>{}); } }catch(e){ console.warn('Firestore unavailable:', e.message); // Continue — don't block navigation } } if(isNewUser && firebaseUser){ // New user — show profile setup screen try{ const gPhoto = $i('g-photo'); const gName = $i('g-name'); const gEmail = $i('g-email'); const profName = $i('prof-name'); if(gPhoto){ gPhoto.src=firebaseUser.photoURL||''; gPhoto.style.display=firebaseUser.photoURL?'block':'none'; } if(gName) gName.textContent = firebaseUser.displayName || 'New Pirate'; if(gEmail) gEmail.textContent = firebaseUser.email || ''; if(profName) profName.value = firebaseUser.displayName || ''; }catch(err){} showScreen('screen-profile'); } else { // Returning user — go straight to menu loadLocal(); showLoad('Welcome back, '+(USER.name||'Captain')+'!', 1200) .then(()=>{ updateMenuUI(); showScreen('screen-menu'); checkUpdates(); pickRandomBg(); }); } } async function saveToCloud(uid,data){ if(!fbDb)return; try{await fbDb.collection('users').doc(uid).set(data,{merge:true});$i('sync-badge').style.display='block';}catch(e){} } async function addHistory(entry){ history.unshift(entry);localStorage.setItem('op_hist',JSON.stringify(history.slice(0,200))); if(fbDb&&fbUser){ try{await fbDb.collection('users').doc(fbUser.uid).collection('history').add({...entry,timestamp:firebase.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp()});}catch(e){} } } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ AUTH UI ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function switchTab(t){ ['li','reg'].forEach(k=>{$i('tab-'+k).classList.toggle('on',k===t);$i('pane-'+k).classList.toggle('on',k===t);}); } function instantPlay(mode){ USER.name='Pirate';USER.isGuest=true;loadLocal();updateMenuUI(); showLoad(mode==='tutorial'?'Preparing Tutorial...':'Heading to the Grand Line...',1600).then(()=>{ checkUpdates(); if(mode==='tutorial'){ doTutorial(); } else { showScreen('screen-menu'); setTimeout(doFreePlay, 60); } }); } function guestLogin(){ const n=$i('guest-name').value.trim(); if(!n){toast('Enter a display name!','err');return;} USER.name=n;USER.isGuest=true;loadLocal(); localStorage.setItem('op_profile',JSON.stringify({name:n,xp:USER.xp,lang:USER.lang})); loadAvatar();showLoad('Welcome Aboard, '+n+'!',1400).then(()=>{updateMenuUI();showScreen('screen-menu');checkUpdates();pickRandomBg();}); } function guestReg(){ const n=$i('guest-name').value.trim(); if(!n){toast('Enter a display name!','err');return;} USER.name=n;USER.isGuest=true; localStorage.setItem('op_profile',JSON.stringify({name:n,xp:USER.xp,lang:USER.lang})); showLoad('Creating Profile...',1400).then(()=>{updateMenuUI();showScreen('screen-menu');checkUpdates();}); } // XP and lang pickers on profile screen document.querySelectorAll('.xp-opt').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.xp-opt').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));el.classList.add('on');})); document.querySelectorAll('.lpill').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>el.classList.toggle('on'))); async function saveProfile(){ const n=$i('prof-name').value.trim(); if(!n){toast('Enter a display name!','err');return;} USER.name=n; USER.xp=document.querySelector('.xp-opt.on')?.dataset.xp||'beginner'; USER.lang=[...document.querySelectorAll('.lpill.on')].map(e=>e.dataset.lang).join(', ')||'English'; if(USER.uid)await saveToCloud(USER.uid,{name:USER.name,xp:USER.xp,lang:USER.lang,createdAt:new Date().toISOString()}); loadLocal(); showLoad('Welcome to the Crew, '+n+'!',1600).then(()=>{updateMenuUI();showScreen('screen-menu');checkUpdates();}); } function loadLocal(){ const h=localStorage.getItem('op_hist');if(h)try{history=JSON.parse(h);}catch(e){} const p=localStorage.getItem('op_profile');if(p)try{const d=JSON.parse(p);USER={...USER,...d};}catch(e){} // Generate persistent user ID if not set if(!USER.uid){ const saved = localStorage.getItem('op_user_uid'); USER.uid = saved || ('OP' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,6).toUpperCase()); if(!saved) localStorage.setItem('op_user_uid', USER.uid); } } function updateMenuUI(){ setH('u-name',USER.name||'Captain'); setH('u-xp',{beginner:'Beginner',intermediate:'Intermediate',advanced:'Advanced'}[USER.xp]||USER.xp); const uidEl=$i('u-uid');if(uidEl)uidEl.textContent=USER.uid?'#'+USER.uid:''; const img=$i('u-img'),ini=$i('u-init'); if(fbUser?.photoURL){img.src=fbUser.photoURL;img.style.display='block';ini.style.display='none';} else{img.style.display='none';ini.style.display='flex';setH('u-init',(USER.name||'?')[0].toUpperCase());} } function showUserMenu(){ setH('um-name',USER.name||'Captain'); const w=history.filter(h=>h.result==='win').length,l=history.filter(h=>h.result==='lose').length; $i('um-info').innerHTML=(fbUser ?'☁ Cloud sync active' :'⚠ Guest — progress saved locally') +'
'+w+' wins · '+l+' losses · '+history.length+' games'; $i('um-google').style.display=fbUser?'none':'flex'; // Show sign-out for Google users; show "back to start" for guests $i('um-signout').style.display='block'; $i('um-signout').textContent=fbUser?'🚪 Sign Out':'🚪 Leave & Clear Profile'; openM('m-user'); } function checkUpdates(){ $i('update-area').innerHTML=`
🆕
New Cards — OP-15 / PRB-02 Now Available
Live data from optcgapi.com · 4,347+ cards across 51 sets.
`; } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ HISTORY SCREEN ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function renderHistory(){ $i('hist-cloud').textContent=fbUser?'☁ Cloud synced':'💾 Guest — local only'; $i('hist-cloud').style.color=fbUser?'var(--green)':'var(--don)'; const body=$i('hist-body'); if(!history.length){body.innerHTML='
🏴‍☠️

No games yet. Play Tutorial or Free Play to start tracking!

';return;} const wins=history.filter(h=>h.result==='win').length; const losses=history.filter(h=>h.result==='lose').length; const total=history.length; const rate=total?Math.round(wins/total*100):0; let streak=0,stype=''; for(const h of history){if(!stype){stype=h.result;streak=1;}else if(h.result===stype)streak++;else break;} const lStats={}; history.forEach(h=>{if(!h.myLeader)return;if(!lStats[h.myLeader])lStats[h.myLeader]={w:0,t:0};lStats[h.myLeader].t++;if(h.result==='win')lStats[h.myLeader].w++;}); const best=Object.entries(lStats).sort((a,b)=>(b[1].w/b[1].t)-(a[1].w/a[1].t))[0]; body.innerHTML=`
${total}
Games Played
${wins}
Victories
${losses}
Defeats
${rate}%
Win Rate
Win Rate
${wins}W / ${losses}L${streak>1?' · '+streak+'-game '+(stype==='win'?'win':'loss')+' streak':''}
0%${best?`Best: ${best[0]} (${Math.round(best[1].w/best[1].t*100)}%)`:''} 100%
Match History
${history.map(h=>{ const isTut=h.mode==='tutorial';const rc=isTut?'tutorial':h.result; const ri=isTut?'📖':(h.result==='win'?'🏆':'💀'); const rt=isTut?'TUTORIAL':(h.result==='win'?'WIN':'LOSS'); const dt=h.date?new Date(h.date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'}):'—'; const db=h.difficulty&&!isTut?`${h.difficulty}`:''; return`
${ri}
${rt}
${isTut?'Tutorial':('vs '+h.oppLeader)} ${db}
👑 ${h.myLeader||'—'}📅 ${dt}
${h.turns||0}turns
`; }).join('')}
`; setTimeout(()=>{const f=$i('wr-fill');if(f)f.style.width=rate+'%';},100); } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ DECK BUILDER ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ document.querySelectorAll('.cswatch').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.cswatch').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));el.classList.add('on');DB.color=el.dataset.col;})); document.querySelectorAll('.slv').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.slv').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('on'));el.classList.add('on');DB.sleeve=el.dataset.sl;})); function filterCards(f){if(typeof dbFilters!=='undefined')dbFilters.type=f;renderBrowser();} function renderBrowser(){ CARDS.forEach(registerCard); LEADERS.forEach(registerCard); const g=$i('card-browser'); if(!g)return; const search=($i('db-search')||{}).value||''; const sq=search.toLowerCase().trim(); const list=CARDS.filter(card=>{ if(BLOCK.enforced && !isBlockLegal(card.id)) return false; if(dbFilters.type !=='all' && card.type !==dbFilters.type) return false; if(dbFilters.color !=='all' && !(card.color||'').includes(dbFilters.color)) return false; if(dbFilters.affil !=='all' && !(card.affiliation||'').includes(dbFilters.affil)) return false; if(dbFilters.series!=='all' && card.series!==dbFilters.series) return false; if(sq && !card.name.toLowerCase().includes(sq) && !(card.affiliation||'').toLowerCase().includes(sq)) return false; return true; }); if(!list.length){ g.innerHTML='
No cards match filters
'; return; } // Apply library sort if(dbSortMode==='cost-asc') list.sort((a,b)=>a.cost-b.cost); else if(dbSortMode==='cost-desc') list.sort((a,b)=>b.cost-a.cost); else if(dbSortMode==='name') list.sort((a,b)=>a.name.localeCompare(b.name)); else if(dbSortMode==='power') list.sort((a,b)=>(b.power||0)-(a.power||0)); g.innerHTML=list.map(card=>{ const q=DB.cards[card.id]||0; registerCard(card); return `
${card.color==='Red'?'🔴':card.color==='Blue'?'🔵':card.color==='Green'?'🟢':card.color==='Purple'?'🟣':card.color==='Yellow'?'🟡':card.color==='Black'?'⚫':'🃏'}
${card.name}
${(typeof LANG_PREF!=="undefined"&&LANG_PREF==="jp"&&card.jpName)?card.jpName:card.name}
${card.cost}
${q>0?`
×${q}
`:''}
`; }).join(''); } function dbAddCard(cardId){ var card = CARDS.find(function(c){return c.id===cardId;}); if(!card){ toast('Card not found','err'); return; } var total = Object.values(DB.cards).reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0); if(total >= 50){ toast('Deck is full (50 cards max)','err'); return; } var qty = DB.cards[cardId]||0; if(qty >= 4){ toast('Max 4 copies per card','err'); return; } // Legality check: card color must match leader color var ldrSel = $i('deck-ldr'); var ldrId = ldrSel ? ldrSel.value : ''; if(ldrId){ var ldr = LEADERS.find(function(l){return l.id===ldrId;}); if(ldr){ var ldrColors = ldr.color.split('/').map(function(x){return x.trim();}); var cardColors = (card.color||'').split('/').map(function(x){return x.trim();}); var legal = cardColors.some(function(cc){ return ldrColors.includes(cc); }); if(!legal){ // Warn but still allow (some decks are intentionally multi-color) toast('\u26a0\ufe0f ' + card.name + ' may not match leader color (' + ldr.color + ')','warn'); } } } DB.cards[cardId] = qty + 1; renderDeckList(); dbRenderCostCurve(); // Flash the card qty badge var bcard = document.querySelector('.bcard[data-id="'+cardId+'"]'); if(bcard) bcard.classList.add('just-added'); setTimeout(function(){ if(bcard) bcard.classList.remove('just-added'); },400); } function dbShowCardPreview(id){ const card=CARDS.find(c=>c.id===id)||LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===id); if(!card) return; // Update left panel leader preview if it's a leader if(card.type==='leader'||LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===id)){ const ldrImg=$i('db-leader-img'); if(ldrImg){ ldrImg.src=IMG(id); ldrImg.style.display='block'; } } // Right panel card preview const img=$i('db-preview-img'); const nm=$i('db-preview-name'); const eff=$i('db-preview-eff'); if(img){ img.src=IMG_HI(id)||IMG(id); } if(nm) nm.textContent=card.name+' — '+card.color+' | Cost:'+card.cost+' | Pow:'+card.power; if(eff) eff.textContent=card.effect||''; const prev=$i('db-card-preview'); if(prev) prev.style.display='block'; } function removeCard(id){if(!DB.cards[id])return;DB.cards[id]--;if(!DB.cards[id])delete DB.cards[id];renderBrowser();renderDeckList();} function renderDeckList(){ const tot=Object.values(DB.cards).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0);setH('deck-cnt',tot); const prog=$i('deck-progress'); if(prog) prog.style.width=Math.min(100,tot/50*100)+'%'; dbRenderCostCurve(); const l=$i('deck-list');if(!l)return; if(!tot){ l.innerHTML='
No cards yet
Click cards to add
'; return; } // Build + sort entries let entries=Object.entries(DB.cards).map(([id,q])=>{ const card=CARDS.find(x=>x.id===id)||LEADERS.find(x=>x.id===id); return {id,q,card}; }).filter(e=>e.card); if(dbDeckSortMode==='cost') entries.sort((a,b)=>(a.card.cost||0)-(b.card.cost||0)); else if(dbDeckSortMode==='name') entries.sort((a,b)=>a.card.name.localeCompare(b.card.name)); l.innerHTML=entries.map(({id,q,card})=>{ const col=colorHex(card.color||'Red'); return `
${q}
${card.name}
C${card.cost||0}
−
`; }).join(''); } function clearDeck(){DB.cards={};renderBrowser();renderDeckList();} function saveDeck(){ const n=$i('deck-name').value.trim();if(!n){toast('Enter a deck nickname!','err');return;} const tot=Object.values(DB.cards).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0);if(!tot){toast('Add some cards first!','err');return;} DB.leader=$i('deck-ldr').value; const d={...DB,name:n,savedAt:new Date().toLocaleDateString(),cnt:tot}; const idx=savedDecks.findIndex(x=>x.name===n);if(idx>=0)savedDecks[idx]=d;else savedDecks.push(d); renderSavedDecks();toast('Deck "'+n+'" saved! 💾','ok'); } function renderSavedDecks(){ const el=$i('saved-decks');if(!el)return; if(!savedDecks.length){el.innerHTML='
No saved decks yet
';return;} el.innerHTML=savedDecks.map((d,i)=>`
${d.name}
${d.cnt} cards · ${d.sleeve} · ${d.savedAt}
`).join(''); } function loadDeck(i){const d=savedDecks[i];DB={...d};$i('deck-name').value=d.name;$i('deck-ldr').value=d.leader||'ST01-001';document.querySelectorAll('.cswatch').forEach(el=>el.classList.toggle('on',el.dataset.col===d.color));document.querySelectorAll('.slv').forEach(el=>el.classList.toggle('on',el.dataset.sl===d.sleeve));renderBrowser();renderDeckList();toast('Loaded "'+d.name+'"','ok');} renderSavedDecks(); /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ FREE PLAY / TUTORIAL ENTRY ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ let fpDeckMode = 'prebuilt'; // 'prebuilt' or 'saved' let fpSavedDeckIdx = -1; function fpTab(mode){ fpDeckMode = mode; $i('fp-panel-prebuilt').style.display = mode==='prebuilt'?'':'none'; $i('fp-panel-saved').style.display = mode==='saved'?'':'none'; $i('fp-tab-prebuilt').style.background = mode==='prebuilt'?'var(--red)':'var(--bg3)'; $i('fp-tab-prebuilt').style.color = mode==='prebuilt'?'#fff':'var(--tx2)'; $i('fp-tab-saved').style.background = mode==='saved'?'var(--gold)':'var(--bg3)'; $i('fp-tab-saved').style.color = mode==='saved'?'#1a1200':'var(--tx2)'; } function doFreePlay(){ const g=$i('fp-ldr'); if(g) g.innerHTML=LEADERS.map(l=>`
${l.name}
${l.color} · Life ${l.life}
${l.power}
`).join(''); // Populate saved decks list const sl=$i('fp-saved-list'), sn=$i('fp-saved-none'); if(sl){ if(savedDecks.length){ sn.style.display='none'; sl.innerHTML=savedDecks.map((d,i)=>`
${d.name} ${fpSavedDeckIdx===i?'✓ Selected':''}
${d.cnt||0} cards · Leader: ${(LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===d.leader)||{name:d.leader}).name} · ${d.sleeve}
`).join(''); } else { sn.style.display='block'; sl.innerHTML=''; } } fpDeckMode='prebuilt'; fpTab('prebuilt'); openM('m-fp'); } function fpSelectDeck(idx){ fpSavedDeckIdx=idx; doFreePlay(); // re-render to show selection } function selDiff(d){document.querySelectorAll('.dopt').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('on'));document.querySelector('.dopt[data-d="'+d+'"]').classList.add('on');aiDiff=d;} function selLdr(id){p1Lid=id;document.querySelectorAll('.lopt').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('on'));document.querySelector('.lopt[data-lid="'+id+'"]')?.classList.add('on');} function startFP(){ if(fpDeckMode==='saved'){ if(fpSavedDeckIdx<0||fpSavedDeckIdx>=savedDecks.length){ toast('Select a saved deck first!','err'); return; } const deck=savedDecks[fpSavedDeckIdx]; p1Lid=deck.leader||'ST01-001'; } closeM('m-fp');gMode='freeplay'; showScreen('screen-game'); showLoad('Setting Sail...',1400).then(()=>{ try{ initGame(p1Lid, fpDeckMode==='saved'?savedDecks[fpSavedDeckIdx]:null); renderGame(); }catch(e){ console.error('FreePlay initGame error:',e); toast('Error starting game: '+e.message,'err'); } }); } function doTutorial(){ try{ gMode='tutorial';p1Lid='ST01-001'; // Immediately navigate to game screen first showScreen('screen-game'); showLoad('Preparing Tutorial...',1400).then(()=>{ try{ initGame(p1Lid); G.ta=true;G.ts=0; renderTut(); renderGame(); }catch(e){ console.error('Tutorial initGame error:',e); toast('Error starting tutorial: '+e.message,'err'); } }); }catch(e){ console.error('doTutorial error:',e); } } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ GAME ENGINE ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function mkDeck(){ const cards=[];let u=0; for(let i=0;i<50;i++){ const s=CARDS[i%CARDS.length]; const card={...s,uid:s.id+'_'+u++,rested:false,donAtt:0}; registerCard(card); // register uid → card data cards.push(card); } return shuffle(cards); } function mkPlayer(lDef,name,human){ const deck=mkDeck();const life=deck.splice(0,lDef.life);const hand=deck.splice(0,5); const don=Array.from({length:10},(_,i)=>({uid:'d'+i,on:false})); const leader={...lDef,uid:lDef.id+'_L',rested:false,donAtt:0,type:'leader'}; registerCard(leader); // register leader uid for zoom return{name,human,leader,deck,life,hand,field:[],trash:[],don}; } function initGame(p1lid, savedDeck){ CARDS.forEach(registerCard); LEADERS.forEach(registerCard); const p1L=LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===p1lid)||LEADERS[0]; const others=LEADERS.filter(l=>l.id!==p1L.id); const p2L=others[Math.floor(Math.random()*others.length)]; // Build p1 player — use saved deck cards if provided let p1Player; if(savedDeck && savedDeck.cards && Object.keys(savedDeck.cards).length){ p1Player = mkPlayerFromSavedDeck(p1L, USER.name||'You', true, savedDeck); } else { p1Player = mkPlayer(p1L, USER.name||'You', true); } G={p1:p1Player,p2:mkPlayer(p2L,'Opponent',false), ap:'p1',ph:'Refresh',turn:1,sc:null,ac:null, log:[{m:'Game started! '+(savedDeck?'('+savedDeck.name+') ':'')+'You go first.',t:'sy'}], winner:null,ft:true,ta:gMode==='tutorial',ts:0,mode:gMode}; const tutCol=$i('tut-col');const sg=$i('screen-game'); if(gMode!=='tutorial'){ if(tutCol)tutCol.style.display='none'; if(sg)sg.classList.remove('tut-mode'); } renderGame(); } function mkPlayerFromSavedDeck(lDef, name, human, savedDeck){ // Expand saved deck cards object {cardId: count} into full card array let cards=[];let u=0; Object.entries(savedDeck.cards).forEach(([id,cnt])=>{ const base=CARDS.find(c=>c.id===id); if(!base)return; for(let i=0;i({uid:'p1d'+i,on:false})); const leader={...lDef,uid:lDef.id+'_L',rested:false,donAtt:0,type:'leader'}; registerCard(leader); return{name,human,leader,deck,life,hand,field:[],trash:[],don}; } const ap=()=>G[G.ap];const op=()=>G[G.ap==='p1'?'p2':'p1']; const apk=()=>G.ap;const opk=()=>G.ap==='p1'?'p2':'p1'; const avDon=p=>p.don.filter(d=>d.on).length; const ep=c=>(c.power||0)+(c.donAtt||0)*1000; function spDon(don,n){const d=[...don];let s=0;for(let i=0;i{if(!p.deck.length){gLog(p.name+' ran out of cards!','bt');G.winner=k==='p1'?'p2':'p1';return p;}const[d,...deck]=p.deck;gLog(p.name+' drew.','ev');return{...p,deck,hand:[...p.hand,d]};});} function nextPhase(){ // In PVP: only allow if it's my turn if(G.mode==='pvp' && G.ap!==pvpMyRole){ toast("It's not your turn",'err'); return; } if(G.mode!=='pvp' && G.ap!=='p1') return; const idx=PHASES.indexOf(G.ph); if(idxc.uid===G.sc);if(!card)return; const don=avDon(p); if(card.cost>don){toast('Need '+card.cost+' DON!! (have '+don+')','err');return;} if(card.type==='character'&&p.field.length>=5){toast('Field full (max 5)','err');return;} applyAction({type:'PLAY_CARD',uid:G.sc}); renderGame(); } function doDonCard(){ if(G.mode==='pvp'&&G.ap!==pvpMyRole){toast("Not your turn",'err');return;} if(!G.sc){toast('Select a card on your field first','err');return;} const f=ap().field.find(c=>c.uid===G.sc);if(!f){toast('Select a card on your field','err');return;} if(avDon(ap())<1){toast('No DON!! available','err');return;} applyAction({type:'DON_CARD',uid:G.sc}); renderGame(); } function doDonLeader(){ if(G.mode==='pvp'&&G.ap!==pvpMyRole){toast("Not your turn",'err');return;} if(avDon(ap())<1){toast('No DON!! available','err');return;} applyAction({type:'DON_LEADER'}); renderGame(); } function doAtkLeader(){if(G.ph!=='Main')return;G.ac='leader';openAtkM();if(G.ta)advTut('atk');} function doAtkCard(){ if(!G.sc||G.ph!=='Main')return; const f=ap().field.find(c=>c.uid===G.sc);if(!f){toast('Select a character on your field','err');return;} if(f.rested){toast('That card is rested','err');return;} G.ac=G.sc;openAtkM();if(G.ta)advTut('atk'); } function openAtkM(){ const att=G.ac==='leader'?ap().leader:ap().field.find(c=>c.uid===G.ac); const atkP=ep(att);const o=op(); $i('m-atk-desc').innerHTML=`${att.name} ${atkP} power — choose a target:`; // Build targets with power math const mathHtml=(defP,defName,isLeader)=>{ const win=atkP>defP;const tie=atkP===defP; const diff=atkP-defP; const resultCls=win?'atk-win':tie?'atk-tie':'atk-lose'; const resultTxt=win?'✓ WIN (+'+diff+')':(tie?'⚡ TIE (defender wins)':'✗ LOSE ('+diff+')'); const extraInfo=isLeader?`
Life: ${o.life.length} card(s) remaining
`:''; return `
Your Attacker${atkP}
Target: ${defName}${defP}
${att.name} vs ${defName}${resultTxt}
${extraInfo}
`; }; $i('m-atk-tgts').innerHTML= `
Click a target to confirm attack:
` +`` +o.field.map(c=>``).join(''); openM('m-atk'); } function resAtk(tType,tUid){ closeM('m-atk'); applyAction({type:'ATTACK_RESOLVE', attId:G.ac, defType:tType, defId:tUid||null}); renderGame(); } /* AI */ function aiTurn(){ if(G.winner||G.ap!=='p2')return; showTurnBanner("OPPONENT'S TURN",'Sit tight, Captain','rgba(232,49,42,.8)'); gLog('AI Refresh.','sy');G.ph='Refresh';renderGame(); setTimeout(()=>{drawCard('p2');G.ph='Draw';renderGame(); setTimeout(()=>{upP('p2',p=>({...p,don:gnDon(p.don,2)}));G.ph='DON!!';renderGame(); setTimeout(()=>{G.ph='Main';aiMain(0);},400);},400);},400); } function aiMain(s){ if(G.winner||G.ap!=='p2')return; const p=G.p2;const don=avDon(p);const diff=aiDiff; if(diff==='hard'&&s===0&&don>0){upP('p2',p2=>({...p2,leader:{...p2.leader,donAtt:p2.leader.donAtt+1},don:spDon(p2.don,1)}));gLog('AI gives DON!! to Leader.','ev');setTimeout(()=>aiMain(s+1),400);return;} if(Math.random()<(diff==='easy'?.4:0)&&s>0){aiEnd();return;} const max=diff==='hard'?4:diff==='medium'?2:1; const aff=p.hand.filter(c=>c.type==='character'&&c.cost<=don&&p.field.length<5); if(aff.length&&sb.power-a.power)[0]; upP('p2',p2=>({...p2,hand:p2.hand.filter(c=>c.uid!==card.uid),don:spDon(p2.don,card.cost),field:[...p2.field,{...card,rested:false,donAtt:0}]})); gLog('Opponent plays '+card.name+'.','ev');renderGame();setTimeout(()=>aiMain(s+1),500);return; } const atts=G.p2.field.filter(c=>!c.rested); if(atts.length&&s<8){ const att=atts[0];G.ac=att.uid; setTimeout(()=>{upP('p2',p2=>({...p2,field:p2.field.map(c=>c.uid===att.uid?{...c,rested:true}:c)}));aiResAtk();renderGame();setTimeout(()=>aiMain(s+1),500);},400);return; } if(!G.p2.leader.rested&&diff!=='easy'){G.ac='leader';setTimeout(()=>{aiResAtk();renderGame();setTimeout(aiEnd,500);},400);return;} aiEnd(); } function aiResAtk(){ const au=G.ac;const att=au==='leader'?G.p2.leader:G.p2.field.find(c=>c.uid===au); if(!att){G.ac=null;return;} const atkP=ep(att);const mlp=ep(G.p1.leader); gLog('⚔ '+att.name+'('+atkP+') vs Your Leader('+mlp+')','bt'); upP('p2',p2=>({...p2,leader:au==='leader'?{...p2.leader,rested:true}:p2.leader,field:p2.field.map(c=>c.uid===au?{...c,rested:true}:c)})); if(atkP>mlp){ gLog("Your Leader takes damage!",'bt'); upP('p1',p1=>{if(!p1.life.length){G.winner='p2';return p1;}const[d,...life]=p1.life;gLog('You add life ('+life.length+' left)','ev');const np={...p1,life,hand:[...p1.hand,d]};if(!life.length)G.winner='p2';return np;}); }else gLog('AI attack failed.','bt'); G.ac=null;if(G.winner)setTimeout(endGame,400); } function aiEnd(){ upP('p2',p=>({...p,field:p.field.map(c=>({...c,rested:false,donAtt:0})),leader:{...p.leader,rested:false,donAtt:0}})); gLog("Opponent ends turn.",'sy');G.ap='p1';G.ph='Refresh';G.turn++;G.sc=null;G.ac=null; upP('p1',p=>({...p,field:p.field.map(c=>({...c,rested:false,donAtt:0})),leader:{...p.leader,rested:false,donAtt:0}})); renderGame();if(G.winner){endGame();return;} // Show "Your Turn!" banner with delay so player sees it after AI animation setTimeout(()=>showTurnBanner('YOUR TURN ⚓','Your move, Captain','rgba(245,200,66,.8)'), 200); } /* RESET + END */ function confirmReset(){openM('m-reset');} function doReset(){closeM('m-reset');showLoad('Resetting...',900).then(()=>{if(G.mode==='tutorial')doTutorial();else{initGame(p1Lid);renderGame();}toast('Game reset!','ok');});} function endGame(){ if(!G.winner)return; const w=G.winner==='p1';const isTut=G.mode==='tutorial'; addHistory({id:Date.now()+'',date:new Date().toISOString(),mode:G.mode,result:isTut?'tutorial':(w?'win':'lose'),turns:G.turn,myLeader:G.p1.leader.name,oppLeader:G.p2.leader.name,difficulty:aiDiff}); setH('win-title',w?'VICTORY!':'DEFEATED'); $i('win-title').className='win-title '+(w?'w':'l'); setH('win-sub',w?"You reduced the opponent's life to 0!":"Your leader has fallen. Train harder!"); $i('rematch-btn').onclick=()=>{if(G.mode==='tutorial')doTutorial();else{initGame(p1Lid);showScreen('screen-game');}}; showScreen('screen-winner'); } /* TUTORIAL */ function renderTut(){ const col=$i('tut-col');const sg=$i('screen-game'); if(!G.ta){ if(col)col.style.display='none'; if(sg)sg.classList.remove('tut-mode'); return; } // Show sidebar column if(col)col.style.display='flex'; if(sg)sg.classList.add('tut-mode'); const step=TUT[G.ts];const total=TUT.length; setH('tut-n',G.ts+1);setH('tut-t',step.t);setH('tut-b',step.b); $i('tut-prog').style.width=Math.round(G.ts/total*100)+'%'; const al=$i('tut-al'),nb=$i('tut-nb'); if(step.a){al.innerHTML='
Complete the action ↑
';nb.style.display='none';} else{al.innerHTML='';nb.style.display='';nb.textContent=G.ts===total-1?'Finish ✓':'Next →';} document.querySelectorAll('.abtn,.btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('thl-btn')); if(step.a==='np')$i('btn-next')?.classList.add('thl-btn'); if(step.a==='play')$i('btn-play')?.classList.add('thl-btn'); if(step.a==='atk'){$i('btn-atkl')?.classList.add('thl-btn');$i('btn-atkc')?.classList.add('thl-btn');} } function tutNext(){if(G.tsb.classList.remove('thl-btn')); toast('Tutorial dismissed ⚓'); } function advTut(a){if(!G.ta)return;const cur=TUT[G.ts];if(cur&&cur.a===a){G.ts=Math.min(G.ts+1,TUT.length-1);setTimeout(renderTut,200);}} /* RENDER GAME */ function cfHtml(card,opts={}){ if(!card)return''; // Register in lookup map — avoids ALL encoding issues in HTML attributes registerCard(card); const col=colorHex(card.color); const cls=['cf',card.type||'',card.rested?'rested':'',opts.sel?'sel':'',opts.atk?'atk':''].filter(Boolean).join(' '); const imgId=card.card_image_id||card.id; const cost=(card.type==='character'||card.type==='event')?`
${card.cost}
`:''; const donB=card.donAtt>0?`
+${card.donAtt}k
`:''; const pwr=card.type==='leader'?'LEADER':(card.power||0)+(card.donAtt>0?'+'+(card.donAtt*1000):''); const bStyle=card.type==='leader'?';border:2px solid var(--gold)':';border-color:'+col; const zoomKey=card.uid||card.id; return`
${card.name}
${card.power||''}
${cost}${donB}
${pwr}
`; } function backCf(){return`
?
`;} function selCard(uid){G.sc=G.sc===uid?null:uid;renderGame();} function renderGame(){ if(!G.p1)return; const p1=G.p1,p2=G.p2;const mine=G.ap==='p1';const ph=G.ph; // Phase track const pt=$i('ptrack');if(pt)pt.innerHTML=PHASES.map((p,i)=>{const pi=PHASES.indexOf(ph);const cls=p===ph?'on':(i${p}
${i›':''}`}).join(''); setH('turn-lbl','Turn '+G.turn+' · '+(mine?'Your':"Opp's")+' turn'); const p1d=avDon(p1),p2d=avDon(p2); setH('s-ol',p2.life.length+'/'+p2.leader.life);setH('s-od',p2d+'/10');setH('s-oh',p2.hand.length);setH('s-ode',p2.deck.length); setH('s-ml',p1.life.length+'/'+p1.leader.life);setH('s-md',p1d+'/10');setH('s-mh',p1.hand.length);setH('s-mde',p1.deck.length); const dpHtml=arr=>arr.map(d=>`
`).join(''); setH('o-dpips',dpHtml(p2.don));setH('m-dpips',dpHtml(p1.don)); setH('hint-t',ph+' Phase');if($i('hint-b'))$i('hint-b').innerHTML=HINTS[ph]||''; const lb=$i('logbox');if(lb)lb.innerHTML=G.log.slice(0,16).map(e=>`
${e.m}
`).join(''); const lpsF=(n,life)=>Array.from({length:n},(_,i)=>`
`).join(''); const olr=$i('o-lrow');if(olr)olr.innerHTML=cfHtml(p2.leader)+`
${lpsF(p2.leader.life,p2.life.length)}
${p2.leader.name}
`; const ocr=$i('o-crow');if(ocr)ocr.innerHTML=p2.field.map(c=>cfHtml(c)).join('')||'No characters'; const oha=$i('o-harea');if(oha)oha.innerHTML=p2.hand.map(()=>backCf()).join(''); const mlr=$i('m-lrow');if(mlr)mlr.innerHTML=cfHtml(p1.leader,{atk:G.ac==='leader'})+`
${lpsF(p1.leader.life,p1.life.length)}
${p1.leader.name}
`; const mcr=$i('m-crow'); if(mcr){mcr.innerHTML=p1.field.map(c=>cfHtml(c,{sel:G.sc===c.uid,atk:G.ac===c.uid})).join('')||'No characters';mcr.querySelectorAll('.cf').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>selCard(el.dataset.uid)));} const mha=$i('m-harea'); if(mha){mha.innerHTML=p1.hand.map(c=>cfHtml(c,{sel:G.sc===c.uid})).join('');mha.querySelectorAll('.cf').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>selCard(el.dataset.uid)));} $i('my-zone')?.classList.toggle('aturn',mine); const inMain=ph==='Main'&&mine; setD('btn-next',!mine); setD('btn-play',!(inMain&&G.sc&&p1.hand.find(c=>c.uid===G.sc))); setD('btn-donc',!(inMain&&G.sc&&p1d>0)); setD('btn-donl',!(inMain&&p1d>0)); setD('btn-atkl',!(inMain&&!p1.leader.rested)); setD('btn-atkc',!(inMain&&G.sc&&p1.field.find(c=>c.uid===G.sc&&!c.rested))); const nb=$i('btn-next');if(nb)nb.textContent=ph==='End'?'▶ End Turn':'▶ Next: '+(PHASES[PHASES.indexOf(ph)+1]||'End'); // Dynamic button tooltips const btnPlay=$i('btn-play'); if(btnPlay){ if(!G.sc) btnPlay.title='Select a card from your hand first'; else if(p1.hand.find(cc=>cc.uid===G.sc)){ const hc=p1.hand.find(cc=>cc.uid===G.sc); const don=avDon(p1); if(hc.cost>don) btnPlay.title='Need '+hc.cost+' DON!! — you have '+don; else btnPlay.title='Play '+hc.name+' (cost: '+hc.cost+')'; } else btnPlay.title='Select a card from your hand'; } const btnDonC=$i('btn-donc'); if(btnDonC){ if(!G.sc||!p1.field.find(cc=>cc.uid===G.sc)) btnDonC.title='Select a character on YOUR field first'; else if(p1d<1) btnDonC.title='No DON!! available this turn'; else { const fc=p1.field.find(cc=>cc.uid===G.sc); btnDonC.title='Attach DON!! to '+fc.name+' (+1000 power)'; } } const btnDonL=$i('btn-donl'); if(btnDonL){ if(p1d<1) btnDonL.title='No DON!! available this turn'; else btnDonL.title='Attach DON!! to '+p1.leader.name+' (+1000 power)'; } const btnAtkL=$i('btn-atkl'); if(btnAtkL){ if(p1.leader.rested) btnAtkL.title='Leader is rested — cannot attack again this turn'; else if(ph!=='Main') btnAtkL.title='Can only attack during Main Phase'; else btnAtkL.title='Attack with '+p1.leader.name+' ('+ep(p1.leader)+' power)'; } const sc=$i('sc-inner');const card=G.sc?(p1.hand.find(c=>c.uid===G.sc)||p1.field.find(c=>c.uid===G.sc)):null; if(sc){ if(!card){ sc.innerHTML='
🃏
Tap a card to select it
Right-click to zoom
'; } else { const onField=!!p1.field.find(cc=>cc.uid===G.sc); const inHand=!!p1.hand.find(cc=>cc.uid===G.sc); const locLabel=onField?'ON FIELD':inHand?'IN HAND':''; const donBonus=card.donAtt>0?`
DON!! Bonus: +${card.donAtt*1000}
`:''; const totalPow=(card.power||0)+(card.donAtt||0)*1000; sc.innerHTML=`
RIGHT-CLICK TO ZOOM
${locLabel}
${card.name}
Type: ${card.type} · Cost: ${card.cost||0}
Power: ${totalPow}${card.donAtt>0?` (base ${card.power||0})`:''}
${card.counter?`
Counter: +${card.counter}
`:''} ${donBonus} ${card.effect?`
${card.effect}
`:''}
`; } } if(G.ta)renderTut(); updateMobileStats(); } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ CARD ZOOM ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* ── Shared card data population ── */ function _populateZoomModal(card){ const col=colorHex(card.color||'Red'); const hiRes=`https://en.onepiece-cardgame.com/images/cardlist/card/${card.id}.png`; const img=$i('zoom-img'); if(img){ img.src=hiRes; img.onerror=()=>{img.src=IMG(card.id);}; img.style.imageRendering='auto'; } setH('zoom-name', card.name||'—'); const legal=isBlockLegal(card.id); let badges=`${(card.type||'character').toUpperCase()}`; if(card.color) badges+=`${card.color}`; badges+=`${legal?'✓ Standard Legal':'⛔ Rotated'}`; setH('zoom-badges', badges); setH('zoom-power', card.power||'—'); setH('zoom-cost', card.cost!==undefined?card.cost:'—'); setH('zoom-counter', card.counter>0?'+'+card.counter:'—'); const effEl=$i('zoom-effect'); if(card.effect){effEl.textContent=card.effect;effEl.style.display='block';} else effEl.style.display='none'; } function _lookupCardSafe(key){ let card = lookupCard(key); if(!card) card = CARDS.find(c=>c.id===key)||LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===key); return card; } /* ── Main zoom entry: respects SETTINGS.zoomMode ── */ function zoomCard(e, key){ e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); const card = _lookupCardSafe(key); if(!card) return false; if(SETTINGS.zoomMode === 'window'){ showZoomWindow(card, e.clientX, e.clientY); } else { // 'click' mode = fullscreen modal _populateZoomModal(card); $i('zoom-modal').classList.add('open'); } return false; } function closeZoom(){ $i('zoom-modal').classList.remove('open'); hideZoomWindow(); } /* ── Hover zoom: show tooltip near cursor ── */ let _hoverTimer = null; function hoverZoomStart(e, key){ if(SETTINGS.zoomMode !== 'hover') return; _hoverTimer = setTimeout(()=>{ const card = _lookupCardSafe(key); if(card) showZoomWindow(card, e.clientX, e.clientY); }, 120); } function hoverZoomEnd(){ if(_hoverTimer){ clearTimeout(_hoverTimer); _hoverTimer=null; } if(SETTINGS.zoomMode === 'hover') hideZoomWindow(); } /* ── Floating mini-window zoom ── */ function showZoomWindow(card, cx, cy){ let win = $i('zoom-window'); if(!win){ win = document.createElement('div'); win.id = 'zoom-window'; win.innerHTML = '' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
'; win.onclick = ()=>win.style.display='none'; document.body.appendChild(win); } const col = colorHex(card.color||'Red'); const hiRes = `https://en.onepiece-cardgame.com/images/cardlist/card/${card.id}.png`; const img = $i('zw-img'); img.src = hiRes; img.onerror=()=>{img.src=IMG(card.id);}; $i('zw-name').textContent = card.name; const legal = isBlockLegal(card.id); $i('zw-badges').innerHTML = `${(card.type||'character').toUpperCase()}` + `${card.color||''}` + `${legal?'✓ Legal':'⛔ Rotated'}`; $i('zw-stats').innerHTML = `Power: ${card.power||'—'} ` + `Cost: ${card.cost!==undefined?card.cost:'—'}` + (card.counter>0?` Counter: +${card.counter}`:''); const ef = $i('zw-eff'); ef.textContent = card.effect||''; ef.style.display = card.effect?'block':'none'; // Position near cursor, keep in viewport win.style.display = 'flex'; const vw=window.innerWidth, vh=window.innerHeight; const w=320, h=420; let x = cx+16, y = cy-20; if(x+w > vw-10) x = cx-w-16; if(y+h > vh-10) y = vh-h-10; if(y < 10) y = 10; win.style.left = x+'px'; win.style.top = y+'px'; } function hideZoomWindow(){ const win = $i('zoom-window'); if(win) win.style.display='none'; } document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')closeZoom();}); /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ BLOCK ROTATION HELPERS ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function updateBlockWarning(){ const s=$i('fp-block-status'),w=$i('fp-block-warn'); if(!s)return; s.textContent=BLOCK.enforced?'On — Standard only':'Off — All sets allowed'; s.style.color=BLOCK.enforced?'var(--green)':'var(--tx2)'; if(w)w.classList.toggle('show',BLOCK.enforced); } function updateDBBlockStatus(){ const s=$i('db-block-status');if(!s)return; s.textContent=BLOCK.enforced?'On':'Off'; s.style.color=BLOCK.enforced?'var(--green)':'var(--tx2)'; const dbt=$i('db-block-toggle');if(dbt)dbt.checked=BLOCK.enforced; } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ WATERMARK GUARDIAN ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* Randomise background on every load */ const SCREEN_BG = { 'screen-auth': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/21-wf37VakJmZqs.jpg', 'screen-menu': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/21-wf37VakJmZqs.jpg', 'screen-profile': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/21438-AZCMDcXiEIVJ.jpg', 'screen-history': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/90842-cTrSNnORxXyE.jpg', 'screen-deckbuilder': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/14277-HECxHmTQtSF1.jpg', 'screen-pvp': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/127230-T3H9x4FFfDuH.jpg', 'screen-editprofile': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/12215-5EDTqwKXh5SX.jpg', 'screen-game': null, 'screen-winner': 'https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/banner/21-wf37VakJmZqs.jpg', }; let _bgCurrent = ''; let _bgActive = 'a'; // which img element is visible if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{pickRandomBg();setBgImage('screen-auth');});}else{setTimeout(function(){pickRandomBg();setBgImage('screen-auth');},0);} /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ EDIT PROFILE PAGE ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function openEditProfile(){ // Populate fields from current USER state const n = USER.name||'Captain'; // Load saved custom avatar if present and not overridden by Google if(USER.avatar && !fbUser?.photoURL){ const photo=$i('ep-photo'); if(photo){ photo.src=USER.avatar; } } const init = n[0].toUpperCase(); // Avatar const photo=$i('ep-photo'), initEl=$i('ep-init'); if(fbUser?.photoURL){ photo.src=fbUser.photoURL; photo.style.display='block'; initEl.style.display='none'; } else { photo.style.display='none'; initEl.style.display='flex'; initEl.textContent=init; } // Header setH('ep-displayname', n); const xpLabel = {beginner:'Beginner Pirate',intermediate:'Veteran Navigator',advanced:'Grand Line Captain'}; setH('ep-badge', xpLabel[USER.xp]||'Pirate'); // Sync badge const syncWrap = $i('ep-sync-wrap'); syncWrap.innerHTML = fbUser ? '☁ Cloud Sync Active' : '⚠ Local Save Only'; // Stats const wins = history.filter(h=>h.result==='win').length; const losses = history.filter(h=>h.result==='lose').length; const total = history.length; const rate = total>0 ? Math.round(wins/total*100)+'%' : '—'; setH('ep-wins', wins); setH('ep-losses', losses); setH('ep-total', total); setH('ep-rate', rate); // Form fields $i('ep-name').value = USER.name||''; // XP grid document.querySelectorAll('#ep-xp-grid .xp-opt').forEach(el=>{ el.classList.toggle('on', el.dataset.xp === (USER.xp||'beginner')); el.onclick = ()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#ep-xp-grid .xp-opt').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('on')); el.classList.add('on'); }; }); // Language pills const langs = (USER.lang||'English').split(', '); document.querySelectorAll('#ep-lang-row .lpill').forEach(el=>{ el.classList.toggle('on', langs.includes(el.dataset.lang)); el.onclick = ()=> el.classList.toggle('on'); }); // Google / sign-out buttons $i('ep-signout').style.display = fbUser ? 'flex' : 'none'; $i('ep-google').style.display = fbUser ? 'none' : 'flex'; showScreen('screen-editprofile'); } function saveEditProfile(){ const n = $i('ep-name').value.trim(); if(!n){ toast('Please enter a display name!','err'); return; } USER.name = n; USER.xp = document.querySelector('#ep-xp-grid .xp-opt.on')?.dataset.xp || 'beginner'; USER.lang = [...document.querySelectorAll('#ep-lang-row .lpill.on')] .map(e=>e.dataset.lang).join(', ') || 'English'; // Persist locally localStorage.setItem('op_profile', JSON.stringify({name:USER.name, xp:USER.xp, lang:USER.lang})); // Persist to cloud if signed in if(fbUser && fbDb){ saveToCloud(fbUser.uid, {name:USER.name, xp:USER.xp, lang:USER.lang}) .then(()=> toast('Profile saved to cloud ☁','ok')) .catch(()=> toast('Saved locally (cloud error)','err')); } else { toast('Profile saved! ⚓','ok'); } updateMenuUI(); // Update the live avatar initial in the header const initEl = $i('u-init'); if(initEl) initEl.textContent = (USER.name||'?')[0].toUpperCase(); // Go back to wherever user came from closeEditProfile(); } function closeEditProfile(){ // Return to menu if we came from there, otherwise auth if(USER.name){ showScreen('screen-menu'); } else { showScreen('screen-auth'); } } /* ══ AVATAR UPLOAD ══════════════════════════════════════ */ function handleAvatarUpload(e){ const file = e.target.files[0]; if(!file) return; if(file.size > 2*1024*1024){ toast('Image too large (max 2MB)','err'); return; } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = ev => { const dataUrl = ev.target.result; USER.avatar = dataUrl; localStorage.setItem('op_avatar', dataUrl); // Update profile page display const photo=$i('ep-photo'), init=$i('ep-init'); photo.src = dataUrl; photo.style.display='block'; init.style.display='none'; // Update menu header chip const chipImg=$i('u-img'), chipInit=$i('u-init'); if(chipImg){ chipImg.src=dataUrl; chipImg.style.display='block'; } if(chipInit) chipInit.style.display='none'; toast('Avatar updated! ⚓','ok'); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function loadAvatar(){ const saved = localStorage.getItem('op_avatar'); if(!saved) return; USER.avatar = saved; const chipImg=$i('u-img'), chipInit=$i('u-init'); if(chipImg && !fbUser?.photoURL){ chipImg.src=saved; chipImg.style.display='block'; if(chipInit) chipInit.style.display='none'; } } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ PVP — FIREBASE FIRESTORE ROOM SYSTEM ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ let pvpRoom = null; // current room id let pvpRole = null; // 'host' or 'guest' let pvpUnsubscribe = null; // Firestore listener function openPVP(){ // Populate leader dropdowns ['pvp-host-ldr','pvp-join-ldr'].forEach(id=>{ const sel = $i(id); if(!sel) return; sel.innerHTML = LEADERS.map(l=> `` ).join(''); }); $i('pvp-code-box').style.display='none'; $i('pvp-host-status').style.display='none'; $i('pvp-host-status').classList.remove('found','error'); $i('pvp-host-status').classList.add('waiting'); $i('pvp-join-code').value=''; const js=$i('pvp-join-status');js.style.display='none';js.textContent=''; // Reset deck selections pvpHostDeckMode='prebuilt'; pvpJoinDeckMode='prebuilt'; pvpHostSavedDeckIdx=-1; pvpJoinSavedDeckIdx=-1; pvpRenderSavedDecks('host'); pvpRenderSavedDecks('join'); // Reset tabs ['pvp-host-deck-tabs','pvp-join-deck-tabs'].forEach(tabsId=>{ const tabs=$i(tabsId);if(!tabs)return; tabs.querySelectorAll('.pvp-dtab').forEach((t,i)=>t.classList.toggle('active',i===0)); }); showScreen('screen-pvp'); } function pvpDeckTab(side, mode, btn){ const isHost = side==='host'; if(isHost) pvpHostDeckMode=mode; else pvpJoinDeckMode=mode; // Update tab active state const tabsEl=$i('pvp-'+side+'-deck-tabs'); if(tabsEl) tabsEl.querySelectorAll('.pvp-dtab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active')); if(btn) btn.classList.add('active'); // Show/hide panels const preEl=$i('pvp-'+side+'-prebuilt-panel'); const savEl=$i('pvp-'+side+'-saved-panel'); if(preEl) preEl.style.display=mode==='prebuilt'?'':'none'; if(savEl) savEl.style.display=mode==='saved'?'':'none'; if(mode==='saved') pvpRenderSavedDecks(side); } function pvpRenderSavedDecks(side){ const listEl=$i('pvp-'+side+'-deck-list');if(!listEl)return; if(!savedDecks.length){ listEl.innerHTML='
No saved decks yet — build one in Deck Builder!
'; return; } const selIdx = side==='host'?pvpHostSavedDeckIdx:pvpJoinSavedDeckIdx; listEl.innerHTML = savedDecks.map((d,i)=>{ const ldr = LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===d.leader)||{name:d.leader||'?',color:'Red'}; const isSelected = selIdx===i; return `
${d.name}
${d.cnt||0} cards · ${ldr.name}
${isSelected?'✓':''}
`; }).join(''); } function pvpSelectDeck(side, idx){ if(side==='host'){ pvpHostSavedDeckIdx=idx; } else { pvpJoinSavedDeckIdx=idx; } pvpRenderSavedDecks(side); // Auto-set leader from deck const deck=savedDecks[idx]; if(deck&&deck.leader){ const ldrSel=$i('pvp-'+side+'-ldr'); if(ldrSel) ldrSel.value=deck.leader; } } function pvpGetSelectedDeck(side){ const mode = side==='host'?pvpHostDeckMode:pvpJoinDeckMode; const idx = side==='host'?pvpHostSavedDeckIdx:pvpJoinSavedDeckIdx; if(mode==='saved' && idx>=0 && idx{}); } pvpRoom=null; pvpRole=null; pvpRoomId=null; pvpMyRole=null; showScreen('screen-menu'); } function genRoomCode(){ const chars='ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789'; let code=''; for(let i=0;i<6;i++) code+=chars[Math.floor(Math.random()*chars.length)]; return code; } function copyRoomCode(){ const code=$i('pvp-room-code').textContent; navigator.clipboard?.writeText(code).then(()=>toast('Code copied! ⚓','ok')); } async function createPVPRoom(){ if(!fbDb){ toast('Setting up Firebase...',''); await loadFB().catch(()=>{}); } if(!fbDb){ toast('Firebase unavailable — try refreshing','err'); return; } const hostDeck = pvpGetSelectedDeck('host'); const ldrId = hostDeck ? (hostDeck.leader||$i('pvp-host-ldr').value) : $i('pvp-host-ldr').value; const code=genRoomCode(); pvpRoom=code; pvpRole='host'; try{ const roomSeed = Date.now(); await fbDb.collection('pvp_rooms').doc(code).set({ code, host: USER.name||'Host', hostLeader: ldrId, hostDeckCards: hostDeck ? hostDeck.cards : null, guestLeader: null, guestDeckCards: null, guest: null, status: 'waiting', created: Date.now(), seed: roomSeed, moves: [] }); $i('pvp-room-code').textContent=code; $i('pvp-code-box').style.display='block'; const hs=$i('pvp-host-status'); hs.style.display='block'; hs.textContent='⏳ Waiting for opponent to join...'; // Listen for guest joining pvpUnsubscribe = fbDb.collection('pvp_rooms').doc(code).onSnapshot(snap=>{ const data=snap.data(); if(!data) return; if(data.status==='ready' && data.guest){ hs.textContent='🟢 '+data.guest+' joined! Starting game...'; hs.classList.remove('waiting'); hs.classList.add('found'); if(pvpUnsubscribe){ pvpUnsubscribe(); pvpUnsubscribe=null; } setTimeout(()=>startPVPGame(code,'p1',ldrId,data.guestLeader,data.guest,data.seed,hostDeck,data.guestDeckCards?{cards:data.guestDeckCards}:null),1200); } }); toast('Room created! Share the code ⚓','ok'); }catch(e){ const errMsg = e.message||''; if(errMsg.includes('permission') || errMsg.includes('Missing')){ toast('PVP blocked — update Firestore rules to allow pvp_rooms writes. See console.','err'); console.error('Firestore rules need updating. Set pvp_rooms to allow read,write: if true'); } else { toast('Error creating room: '+errMsg,'err'); } } } async function joinPVPRoom(){ const code=$i('pvp-join-code').value.trim().toUpperCase(); if(code.length!==6){ toast('Enter a 6-character code','err'); return; } if(!fbDb){ toast('Setting up Firebase...',''); await loadFB().catch(()=>{}); } if(!fbDb){ toast('Firebase unavailable — try refreshing','err'); return; } const guestDeck = pvpGetSelectedDeck('join'); const ldrId = guestDeck ? (guestDeck.leader||$i('pvp-join-ldr').value) : $i('pvp-join-ldr').value; const js=$i('pvp-join-status'); js.style.display='block'; js.textContent='🔍 Looking for room...'; js.className='pvp-status show waiting'; try{ const snap = await fbDb.collection('pvp_rooms').doc(code).get(); if(!snap.exists){ js.textContent='❌ Room not found. Check the code.'; js.className='pvp-status show error'; return; } const data=snap.data(); if(data.status!=='waiting'){ js.textContent='❌ Room is already full or expired.'; js.className='pvp-status show error'; return; } pvpRoom=code; pvpRole='guest'; await fbDb.collection('pvp_rooms').doc(code).update({ guest: USER.name||'Guest', guestLeader: ldrId, status: 'ready' }); js.textContent='✅ Joined! Starting game...'; js.className='pvp-status show found'; setTimeout(()=>startPVPGame(code,'p2',ldrId,data.hostLeader,data.host,snap.data().seed,guestDeck,data.hostDeckCards?{cards:data.hostDeckCards}:null),1200); }catch(e){ js.textContent='Error: '+e.message; js.className='pvp-status show error'; } } function startPVPGame(code, role, myLdrId, opLdrId, opponentName, seed, myDeck, opDeck){ showLoad('Sailing to Battle vs '+opponentName+'!',1400).then(()=>{ initPVPGame(code, role, myLdrId, opLdrId, opponentName, seed||Date.now(), myDeck, opDeck); }); } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ PVP NETWORK ENGINE — move-by-move Firestore sync ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Architecture: • Every game mutation is expressed as an action object: { type: 'PLAY_CARD', uid: '...' } { type: 'ATTACK', attId: '...', defType: 'leader', defId: null } { type: 'NEXT_PHASE' } etc. • applyAction(action) is the single pure reducer — it mutates G identically on both clients given the same action sequence. • In PVP: the active player's actions are pushed to Firestore. The opponent listens and calls applyAction for each new action. • A shared seed ensures both clients build the same shuffled decks. ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ let pvpSeq = 0; var pvpHostDeckMode = 'prebuilt'; // 'prebuilt' or 'saved' var pvpJoinDeckMode = 'prebuilt'; var pvpHostSavedDeckIdx = -1; var pvpJoinSavedDeckIdx = -1; // action sequence counter (local) let pvpApplied = 0; // highest seq applied from Firestore let pvpActionListener = null; // Firestore unsubscribe fn let pvpMyRole = null; // 'p1' or 'p2' let pvpRoomId = null; /* ── Seeded shuffle so both clients build identical decks ── */ function seededRng(seed){ let s=seed; return ()=>{s=(s*1664525+1013904223)&0xffffffff;return(s>>>0)/4294967296;}; } function seededShuffle(arr,seed){ const a=[...arr];const rng=seededRng(seed); for(let i=a.length-1;i>0;i--){ const j=Math.floor(rng()*(i+1));[a[i],a[j]]=[a[j],a[i]]; } return a; } function mkDeckSeeded(seed,prefix){ const cards=[];let u=0; for(let i=0;i<50;i++){ const s=CARDS[i%CARDS.length]; const card={...s,uid:prefix+'_'+s.id+'_'+u++,rested:false,donAtt:0}; registerCard(card); cards.push(card); } return seededShuffle(cards,seed); } /* ── Push one action to Firestore ── */ async function pushPVPAction(action){ if(!fbDb||!pvpRoomId) return; const seq = ++pvpSeq; const doc = { seq, action, by: pvpMyRole, ts: Date.now() }; try{ await fbDb.collection('pvp_rooms').doc(pvpRoomId) .collection('actions').doc(String(seq).padStart(8,'0')).set(doc); }catch(e){ toast('Network error: '+e.message,'err'); } } /* ── Listen for opponent actions ── */ function startPVPListener(){ if(!fbDb||!pvpRoomId) return; pvpActionListener = fbDb.collection('pvp_rooms').doc(pvpRoomId) .collection('actions') .orderBy('seq') .onSnapshot(snap=>{ snap.docChanges().forEach(change=>{ if(change.type!=='added') return; const {seq,action,by} = change.doc.data(); if(seq<=pvpApplied) return; // already applied if(by===pvpMyRole) return; // own action, already applied locally pvpApplied=seq; applyAction(action, false); // false = don't re-push to Firestore renderGame(); if(G.winner) setTimeout(endGame,400); }); }); } /* ── Stop PVP listener ── */ function stopPVPListener(){ if(pvpActionListener){ pvpActionListener(); pvpActionListener=null; } } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ PURE ACTION REDUCER applyAction(action, push=true) push=true → also push to Firestore (own move) push=false → already from Firestore (opponent move) ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function applyAction(action, push=true){ if(push && G.mode==='pvp') pushPVPAction(action); switch(action.type){ case 'NEXT_PHASE':{ const idx=PHASES.indexOf(G.ph); if(idx({...p,don:gnDon(p.don,n)})); gLog('Gained '+(G.ft&&G.ap==='p1'?1:2)+' DON!!.','sy'); }else if(next==='Draw'&&!(G.ft&&G.ap==='p1')){ drawCard(G.ap); } gLog('Phase: '+next,'sy');G.ph=next;G.sc=null;G.ac=null; }else{ applyAction({type:'END_TURN'}, false); // end turn internally, not pushed again } if(G.ta)advTut('np'); break; } case 'END_TURN':{ const curr=G.ap, next=G.ap==='p1'?'p2':'p1'; upP(curr,p=>({...p, field:p.field.map(c=>({...c,rested:false,donAtt:0})), leader:{...p.leader,rested:false,donAtt:0} })); gLog('Turn '+G.turn+' ended.','sy'); G.ap=next;G.ph='Refresh';G.turn++;G.ft=false;G.sc=null;G.ac=null; upP(next,p=>({...p, field:p.field.map(c=>({...c,rested:false,donAtt:0})), leader:{...p.leader,rested:false,donAtt:0} })); // In PVP: after my turn ends, it's opponent's turn — no AI // In AI: trigger AI if(G.mode!=='pvp'&&!G.winner){ renderGame();setTimeout(aiTurn,500); } break; } case 'PLAY_CARD':{ const {uid}=action; const pk=G.ap;const p=G[pk]; const card=p.hand.find(c=>c.uid===uid);if(!card)break; if(card.type==='event'){ if(card.id==='ST02-013'){ drawCard(pk); drawCard(pk); } upP(pk,p2=>({...p2, hand:p2.hand.filter(c=>c.uid!==uid), don:spDon(p2.don,card.cost), trash:[...p2.trash,card] })); gLog('Event: '+card.name,'ev'); }else{ upP(pk,p2=>({...p2, hand:p2.hand.filter(c=>c.uid!==uid), don:spDon(p2.don,card.cost), field:[...p2.field,{...card,rested:false,donAtt:0}] })); gLog('Played: '+card.name,'ev'); } G.sc=null;if(G.ta)advTut('play'); break; } case 'DON_CARD':{ const {uid}=action;const pk=G.ap; upP(pk,p2=>({...p2, field:p2.field.map(c=>c.uid===uid?{...c,donAtt:c.donAtt+1}:c), don:spDon(p2.don,1) })); const f=G[G.ap].field.find(c=>c.uid===uid); gLog('DON!! to '+(f?.name||'card'),'ev'); break; } case 'DON_LEADER':{ const pk=G.ap; upP(pk,p2=>({...p2,leader:{...p2.leader,donAtt:p2.leader.donAtt+1},don:spDon(p2.don,1)})); gLog('DON!! to Leader.','ev'); break; } case 'ATTACK_RESOLVE':{ const {attId,defType,defId}=action; const pk=G.ap; const opK=pk==='p1'?'p2':'p1'; const att=attId==='leader'?G[pk].leader:G[pk].field.find(c=>c.uid===attId); if(!att) break; const atkP=ep(att); let defP; const o=G[opK]; if(defType==='leader') defP=ep(o.leader); else{ const t=o.field.find(c=>c.uid===defId); defP=ep(t); } const tLabel=defType==='leader'?o.name+"'s Leader":(o.field.find(c=>c.uid===defId)?.name||'card'); gLog('⚔ '+att.name+'('+atkP+') vs '+tLabel+'('+defP+')','bt'); // Rest attacker upP(pk,p2=>({...p2, leader:attId==='leader'?{...p2.leader,rested:true}:p2.leader, field:p2.field.map(c=>c.uid===attId?{...c,rested:true}:c) })); if(atkP>defP){ if(defType==='leader'){ gLog(o.name+"'s Leader takes damage!",'bt'); upP(opK,o2=>{ if(!o2.life.length){G.winner=pk;return o2;} const[d,...life]=o2.life; gLog(o2.name+' adds life ('+life.length+' left)','ev'); const n={...o2,life,hand:[...o2.hand,d]}; if(!life.length) G.winner=pk; return n; }); }else{ gLog(tLabel+' K.O.\'d!','bt'); upP(opK,o2=>({...o2, field:o2.field.filter(c=>c.uid!==defId), trash:[...o2.trash,o2.field.find(c=>c.uid===defId)].filter(Boolean) })); } }else gLog('Attack failed — '+tLabel+' survived.','bt'); G.ac=null; if(G.winner) setTimeout(endGame,400); break; } } } /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ INIT PVP GAME — shared seed guarantees identical decks ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ function initPVPGame(roomCode, myRole, myLdrId, opLdrId, opponentName, seed, myDeck, opDeck){ CARDS.forEach(registerCard); LEADERS.forEach(registerCard); pvpMyRole = myRole; pvpRoomId = roomCode; pvpSeq = 0; pvpApplied = 0; gMode = 'pvp'; const myL = LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===myLdrId)||LEADERS[0]; const opL = LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===opLdrId)||LEADERS[0]; // Build both decks deterministically from shared seed function mkPvpPlayer(lDef, name, isMe, seedOff, savedDeckObj){ let deck; if(savedDeckObj && savedDeckObj.cards && Object.keys(savedDeckObj.cards).length){ // Build deck from saved deck cards deck = []; let u = 0; const prefix = isMe?'p1':'p2'; Object.entries(savedDeckObj.cards).forEach(([id,cnt])=>{ const base = CARDS.find(c=>c.id===id)||LEADERS.find(l=>l.id===id); if(!base) return; for(let i=0;i({uid:(isMe?'p1':'p2')+'d'+i,on:false})); const leader={...lDef,uid:lDef.id+'_L',rested:false,donAtt:0,type:'leader'}; registerCard(leader); return{name,human:isMe,leader,deck,life,hand,field:[],trash:[],don}; } // myRole is 'p1' or 'p2' — determines turn order (p1 always goes first) const p1Data = myRole==='p1' ? mkPvpPlayer(myL, USER.name||'You', true, 0, myDeck) : mkPvpPlayer(opL, opponentName, false, 1, opDeck); const p2Data = myRole==='p1' ? mkPvpPlayer(opL, opponentName, false, 1, opDeck) : mkPvpPlayer(myL, USER.name||'You', true, 0, myDeck); G = { p1:p1Data, p2:p2Data, ap:'p1', ph:'Refresh', turn:1, sc:null, ac:null, log:[{m:'PVP: '+p1Data.name+' vs '+p2Data.name,t:'sy'},{m:'⚔️ You are '+(myRole==='p1'?'Player 1 (first turn)':'Player 2'),t:'sy'}], winner:null, ft:true, ta:false, ts:0, mode:'pvp', pvpCode:roomCode, pvpRole:myRole }; const tutCol=$i('tut-col'),sg=$i('screen-game'); if(tutCol) tutCol.style.display='none'; if(sg) sg.classList.remove('tut-mode'); showScreen('screen-game'); startPVPListener(); renderGame(); toast('⚔️ PVP started! You are '+(myRole==='p1'?'Player 1':'Player 2'),'ok'); } /* ── MOBILE STATS PANEL ── */ function toggleMobileStats(){ const p=$i('mobile-stats-panel'); if(p) p.classList.toggle('open'); } function updateMobileStats(){ if(!G.p1) return; const setV=(id,v)=>{const el=$i(id);if(el)el.textContent=v;}; setV('ms-ol', G.p2.life.length+'/'+G.p2.leader.life); setV('ms-od', avDon(G.p2)+'/10'); setV('ms-oh', G.p2.hand.length); setV('ms-ml', G.p1.life.length+'/'+G.p1.leader.life); setV('ms-md', avDon(G.p1)+'/10'); setV('ms-mh', G.p1.hand.length); const msLog=$i('ms-log'); if(msLog) msLog.textContent = G.log[0]?.m||''; } /* ════════════════════════════════════════ BACKGROUND IMAGE SYSTEM Cross-fade between themed images per screen. Falls back gracefully if image doesn't load. ════════════════════════════════════════ */ function setBgImage(screenId) { const url = SCREEN_BG[screenId]; if (!url || url === _bgCurrent) return; _bgCurrent = url; const activeEl = document.getElementById('bg-img-' + _bgActive); const inactiveEl = document.getElementById('bg-img-' + (_bgActive === 'a' ? 'b' : 'a')); if (!activeEl || !inactiveEl) return; // Load into the inactive element inactiveEl.style.opacity = '0'; inactiveEl.style.transition = 'opacity 0.8s ease'; const img = new Image(); img.onload = function() { inactiveEl.src = url; inactiveEl.classList.add('visible'); // Cross-fade: fade in inactive, fade out active setTimeout(() => { inactiveEl.style.opacity = '1'; activeEl.style.opacity = '0'; activeEl.classList.remove('visible'); _bgActive = _bgActive === 'a' ? 'b' : 'a'; }, 50); }; img.src = url; } /* ════════════════════════════════════════ MUSIC PLAYER — HTML5 Audio Host your MP3 at: music/ost.mp3 in your GitHub repo OR set MUSIC_SRC to any direct MP3 URL ════════════════════════════════════════ */ // ── SET YOUR MP3 URL HERE ── // Option 1: File in your GitHub repo (recommended) // Upload your MP3 as "ost.mp3" to your repo root // Then set: // OST embedded directly as base64 — no external files needed // Audio loaded from embedded

Quick Rules
DON!! = resource
Attach = +1000 power
Attacker must be strictly greater
Rush = attack same turn
Blocker = redirects attacks
